metadata.keywords: IT services Thailand, hospitality IT, hotel IT support, luxury resort IT, Koh Samui IT, Bangkok IT services, F2, Nextgentechs

home.title: F2 Co., Ltd. — Thailand's trusted IT partner for luxury hospitality
home.description: F2 Co., Ltd. provides end-to-end IT services to luxury hotels, villas, and resorts across Thailand — including SALA Hospitality, Miskawaan Beach Villas, and Putahracsa Hua Hin.

services.title: Services
services.description: F2 provides hospitality-grade IT to luxury hotels, villas, and resorts in Thailand: IT management, digital transformation, AI, cybersecurity, hosting, hardware, and solar.

detail.ctaBody: Tell us about your property and we'll show you what F2 can do.

about.title: Built for luxury hospitality. Headquartered in Thailand.
about.lead: F2 Co., Ltd. (formerly Nextgentechs Service & Support Co., Ltd.) is a digital transformation services company. For over a decade we've served Thailand's most demanding luxury hotels, villas, and resorts — and we've never lost a client.

samui.title: Koh Samui HQ
samui.body: Our island team runs nationwide remote operations, same-day on-site response across Samui and the Gulf Coast, hardware deployments, and solar installations.

about.focusBody: 70% of our business is core: IT management, digital transformation, AI, domains & hosting, and our iACC SaaS. 20% is support services — MSP and cybersecurity. The remaining 10% is opportunistic — IT hardware (via SiS Distribution) and solar installations on Samui.

partnerships.title: Partnerships
partnerships.body: ResellerClub.com (domains & hosting, white-label), SiS Distribution (SET-listed hardware distributor), and Microsoft (provider services).

clients.title: Clients
clients.body: Primarily luxury and boutique hospitality. We're a registered, trusted IT service provider in the Thai hospitality industry.

products.title: Products
products.bodySuffix: — our multi-tenant accounting and operations SaaS for tour operators and travel agencies.

products.name: iACC
products.lead: Subscribe to iACC Core for accounting and operations, then add only the industry modules that fit your business. Built by F2 for Thai businesses — bilingual EN/TH, multi-currency, multi-company.

core.title: Professional accounting for modern businesses.
core.subtitle: Everything you need to manage your business finances — and capture every order from your website, LINE, Facebook, or email automatically. Available now.

operations.title: Operations
items: Sales-channel API — website, LINE, Facebook, email
operations.aiParser: AI parser turns unstructured TH/EN messages into customers, quotes & invoices

pricing.title: iACC Core subscription
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need it. View live pricing and full plan comparison on iacc.f2.co.th.

modules.title: Add only what your business needs.
modules.subtitle: Each module sits on top of iACC Core as its own subscription. All three are coming soon — register interest and we'll be in touch when they go live.

tour.name: Tour Operator
tour.blurb: Bookings, agents, allotments, vouchers, multi-currency settlements — flowing straight into iACC Core's accounting.
tour.firstCustomer: My Samui Island Tour Co., Ltd.

transfer.name: Transfer Service
transfer.blurb: Vehicle scheduling, driver dispatch, route conflict detection, and per-trip invoicing connected to your iACC ledger.

ecommerce.name: E-commerce & Web Templates
ecommerce.serves: For any client wanting a brand site
ecommerce.blurb: Branded storefronts and marketing sites with built-in checkout — every order pushed to iACC Core via the sales-channel API.

closing.title: Modern accounting, F2-grade reliability.
closing.subtitle: Try iACC Core free today, or talk to F2 about which modules fit your business.

blog.title: Field notes from F2.
blog.subtitle: Practical writing about IT for hotels, villas, and resorts in Thailand — what we're seeing, what we're shipping, and what we'd do differently next time.

empty.title: First posts coming soon.
empty.body: We're finalising our editorial calendar. In the meantime, head to the case studies for detailed accounts of long-running F2 engagements.

form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us a bit about your property and what you'd like to improve.
form.moduleInterestPrefill: Hi — I'd like to register interest in the {module} module of iACC. Please get in touch when it's available.
form.errorRequired: Name, email, and message are required.
form.errorGeneric: We couldn't submit your enquiry. Please email info@f2.co.th directly.
form.successBody: We've received your enquiry and one of our consultants will be in touch within one business day. A confirmation email is on its way to your inbox.
form.privacyNotice: We'll only use your details to respond to your enquiry. See our

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.lead: F2 Co., Ltd. respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data in accordance with Thailand's Personal Data Protection Act B.E. 2562 (PDPA) and applicable international standards.
privacy.controllerBody: F2 Co., Ltd., registered in Thailand. Privacy contact: privacy@f2.co.th.
privacy.collectBody: We collect personal data only when you interact with us:
privacy.collectItem1: Contact form: name, email, phone, company, and message.
privacy.collectItem2: Chat: conversation transcripts (used to answer your questions; retained 90 days, then anonymised).
privacy.collectItem3: Portal / account: name, email, locale preference, and support ticket history.
privacy.collectItem4: Technical: IP address, browser type, and page visits (essential session cookies only).
privacy.basisBody: We process your data on the basis of: (1) contract; (2) legitimate interest; (3) consent for optional cookies, which you may withdraw at any time.
privacy.useBody: To respond to enquiries, deliver contracted IT services, send service notifications, and improve our website. We do not sell your data to third parties.
privacy.retentionBody: Contact form leads: 2 years then anonymised. Chat transcripts: 90 days then anonymised. Portal account data: retained while active, deleted within 30 days of a verified erasure request.
privacy.crossBorderBody: Our AI chatbot is powered by Anthropic (USA). Conversation text is processed under Anthropic's data processing terms with standard contractual clauses. You may opt out by not using the chat feature.
privacy.cookieBody: We use strictly necessary cookies (session, locale preference) without consent. Optional analytics and marketing cookies are only set after explicit consent via the cookie banner.
privacy.rightsBody: Under Thai PDPA you have the right to:
privacy.right1: Access — request a copy of your personal data.
privacy.right2: Rectification — correct inaccurate or incomplete data.
privacy.right3: Erasure — request deletion of your data.
privacy.right4: Portability — receive your data in a machine-readable format.
privacy.right5: Object — object to processing based on legitimate interest.
privacy.right6: Restriction — request that processing be limited.
privacy.dsrBody: Use the form below to exercise any of the rights above. We will respond within 30 days as required by PDPA.

dsr.type_access: Access — I want to see what data you hold about me
dsr.type_rectification: Rectification — I want to correct my data
dsr.type_erasure: Erasure — I want my data deleted
dsr.type_portability: Portability — I want a copy of my data
dsr.type_objection: Objection — I object to how my data is being used
dsr.successBody: To confirm you own this email address, we just sent you a verification link. Click it within 7 days and our team will respond to your request within 30 days as required by PDPA.
dsr.successHint: Not seeing the email? Check your spam folder, or email privacy@f2.co.th.
dsr.errorMsg: Something went wrong. Please try again or email privacy@f2.co.th.
dsr.disclaimer: We may ask you to verify your identity before fulfilling the request.

confirm.title: Confirm your data request
confirm.verifiedBody: Thank you. Your data request has been verified and added to our queue. Our privacy team will respond within 30 days as required by PDPA.
confirm.expiredBody: This verification link is no longer valid. Confirmation links expire after 7 days, and each can be used only once. If you still want to submit a data request, please start a new one.
confirm.invalidBody: We could not verify this request. The link appears to be incomplete or malformed. Please use the link from your confirmation email exactly as it was sent.

privacy.breachBody: In the event of a personal data breach that poses a risk to your rights and freedoms, we will notify the Thai Personal Data Protection Committee (PDPC) within 72 hours and notify affected individuals without undue delay, as required by PDPA Section 37.

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.acceptanceBody: By accessing f2.co.th or using F2's services, you agree to these terms.
terms.servicesBody: F2 Co., Ltd. provides IT management, Microsoft 365, domain registration, hosting, cloud infrastructure, and related services to hospitality businesses.
terms.accountBody: You are responsible for keeping your credentials confidential. Notify us immediately at support@f2.co.th if you suspect unauthorised access.
terms.conductBody: You agree not to violate any applicable law (including Thailand's Computer Crimes Act), infringe third-party rights, or attempt to gain unauthorised access to our systems.
terms.ipBody: All content on f2.co.th is owned by F2 Co., Ltd. or its licensors. You may not reproduce or distribute it without written permission.
terms.liabilityBody: To the extent permitted by Thai law, F2's liability for indirect losses is excluded. Total liability shall not exceed the amount paid to F2 in the preceding 12 months.
terms.governingLawBody: These terms are governed by the laws of Thailand. Disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Bangkok.
terms.changesBody: We may update these terms. Continued use after an update constitutes acceptance.

dpa.title: Data Processor Agreement
dpa.lead: This agreement is incorporated by reference into F2's Service Agreement with each hotel client. To obtain a countersigned copy, email legal@f2.co.th.
dpa.partiesBody: This Data Processor Agreement ("DPA") is entered into between F2 Co., Ltd. ("F2" or "Processor"), a company registered in Thailand, and the hotel, resort, or villa operator who has engaged F2's services under a Service Agreement ("Controller"). The Controller determines the purposes and means of personal data processing; F2 processes personal data solely on the Controller's behalf and documented instructions.
dpa.definitionsBody: "Personal Data", "Processing", "Data Subject", "Data Controller", and "Data Processor" have the meanings given in Thailand's Personal Data Protection Act B.E. 2562 (PDPA). "Sub-processor" means any third party engaged by F2 to process personal data on behalf of the Controller.
dpa.subjectBody: F2 processes personal data on behalf of the Controller to deliver IT services described in the applicable Service Agreement. These may include: AI chat and guest enquiry handling, contact-form lead management, IT infrastructure operation, domain registration, hosting, and managed Microsoft 365.
dpa.dataTypesBody: Depending on the services engaged, F2 may process:
dpa.dataTypesItem1: Identity and contact data: name, email address, phone number.
dpa.dataTypesItem2: Property-related data: company or property name, role.
dpa.dataTypesItem3: Technical data: IP address, browser type, session identifiers.
dpa.dataTypesItem4: Communication content: chat transcripts, support ticket content, email correspondence.
dpa.subjectsBody: Data subjects include hotel guests, employees of the Controller, and business contacts who interact with services operated by F2 on the Controller's behalf.
dpa.durationBody: This DPA applies for the duration of the Service Agreement and terminates automatically upon its termination, subject to the retention and deletion obligations in Section 11.
dpa.p1Body: F2 processes personal data only on documented instructions from the Controller, including international transfers, unless required to do so by Thai law. F2 will promptly inform the Controller if it considers an instruction to infringe applicable data protection law.
dpa.p2Body: F2 ensures that personnel authorised to process personal data are bound by enforceable confidentiality obligations and that access is limited to those who need it to perform their duties.
dpa.p3Body: F2 implements appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect personal data, including encryption in transit (TLS 1.2+), role-based access controls, audit logging, and a vulnerability management programme.
dpa.p4Body: F2 may engage the sub-processors listed in Section 9. F2 will notify the Controller of any intended addition or replacement of sub-processors and allow a reasonable opportunity to object. F2 imposes equivalent data protection obligations on all sub-processors.
dpa.p5Body: F2 will assist the Controller, to the extent technically possible, in fulfilling its obligations to respond to data subject requests under the PDPA, and in ensuring compliance with security, breach notification, and data protection impact assessment requirements.
dpa.p6Body: F2 will make available all information reasonably necessary to demonstrate compliance and will allow and contribute to audits or inspections conducted by the Controller or an authorised auditor, with reasonable advance notice.
dpa.controllerBody: The Controller is responsible for maintaining a lawful basis for processing, complying with its own PDPA obligations, notifying F2 of changes to processing instructions, and ensuring that personal data provided to F2 is accurate and collected lawfully.
dpa.subProcIntro: As of the effective date, F2 uses the following sub-processors in connection with the services:
dpa.sp1Purpose: AI language model powering the chatbot feature
dpa.sp1Transfer: Anthropic Data Processing Addendum (standard contractual clauses)
dpa.sp2Purpose: Cloud infrastructure and managed PostgreSQL databases
dpa.sp2Transfer: DigitalOcean Data Processing Agreement (standard contractual clauses)
dpa.sp3Transfer: Cloudflare Data Processing Addendum (standard contractual clauses)
dpa.transfersBody: Where F2 transfers personal data outside Thailand, it ensures appropriate safeguards are in place — including standard contractual clauses or an adequacy determination — as required by PDPA Section 28.
dpa.deletionBody: At the Controller's request and no later than 30 days after termination of the Service Agreement, F2 will securely delete or return all personal data processed under this DPA, unless Thai law requires continued storage.
dpa.breachBody: F2 will notify the Controller without undue delay, and no later than 48 hours, after becoming aware of a personal data breach affecting data processed under this DPA, providing sufficient information for the Controller to meet its own PDPA notification obligations.
dpa.governingLawBody: This DPA is governed by the laws of Thailand. Any dispute arising out of or in connection with this DPA shall be resolved in the competent courts of Bangkok.
dpa.signaturesBody: This DPA is incorporated by reference into the Service Agreement signed by both parties. Where a separate execution page is required, both the Controller and F2 must sign and date it. The countersigned document is the binding version.
dpa.contactBody: To receive a countersigned DPA for your records, email

metadata.title: Domain Names — F2 Co., Ltd.
metadata.description: Register Thai (.co.th, .or.th, .in.th) and international domains (.com, .net, .org, .asia, .biz). F2 is a direct THNIC reseller and ResellerClub partner.

hero.title: Domain names, registered the right way.
hero.subtitle: F2 is a direct THNIC reseller for Thai ccTLDs and a ResellerClub partner for international gTLDs. One invoice, one renewal calendar, one team that picks up the phone.

cta.title: Not sure which TLD fits?
cta.body: Tell us about your brand and we'll recommend the right combination — most resort groups end up with .co.th + .com defensively registered to the same owner.

status.manualHint: Thai ccTLDs are placed via the THNIC partner portal — F2 confirms availability within 1 business day.

metadata.title: Web Hosting — F2 Co., Ltd.
metadata.description: Managed shared hosting from F2: free SSL, daily backups, PHP 8.x + MySQL, optimised for WordPress and Joomla. Asia/Bangkok-based support.

hero.title: Hosting that doesn't go quiet at 11pm.
hero.subtitle: Three plans, all with free SSL, F2-monitored uptime, and Asia/Bangkok-hours support. Built for property pages, restaurant brand sites, and the small CMS estates that come with running a hospitality group.

items.label: Production-grade
items.body: Every plan runs on F2-managed infrastructure with redundant power, on-host monitoring, and a 99.9% uptime target.

items.label: Managed migration
items.body: We migrate your existing site for free if you're moving to F2 from another host — including DNS cutover and SSL re-issuance.

items.label: Dedicated VPS available
items.body: Need more isolation? Our cloud-infrastructure service builds you a managed DigitalOcean VPS with the same support team.

cta.title: Bigger workload?
cta.body: If your traffic, plug-in stack, or compliance posture has outgrown shared hosting, look at our managed Cloud & VPS service — built on DigitalOcean and run by the same F2 team.
